      Corporate Alliance

      The APA Foundation’s Corporate Alliance unites stakeholders around advancing mental health in our communities and provides an opportunity for industry to join the APA and APAF's leadership to discuss issues national in scope and local in application.

      • Monthly Giving
      • Legacy Giving
      • Corporate Alliance
      • Partnerships
      • Honor Roll
      • Lifestyle Psychiatry Prevention and Wellness Campaign

      As a 501(c)3 philanthropic organization and the nonprofit programming arm of the American Psychiatric Association, the APA Foundation complements the professional work of the APA through innovative outreach aimed at eliminating stigma, raising awareness, and overcoming barriers to care – with a vision to create a mentally healthy nation for all.

      We cannot do our work alone. The APA Foundation Corporate Alliance is a roundtable that brings together companies that share a commitment to improving mental health in communities across the country. It serves as a mechanism to encourage corporate support and participation in public education and research initiatives of the APA Foundation.

      Join Us

      Together, we can extend the impact of our work towards building a mentally healthy nation. Download our brochure for full information on partnership levels and benefits.

      Download the Brochure (.pdf)

      Current Members: Without the critical support of the Corporate Alliance member companies below, our important work would not be possible.

      Foundation Patron

      Grand Patrons

      Patrons
